Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course explicitly covers the institutional design of financial regulatory systems and emphasizes 'Accountability, Governance, and Transparency,' directly contributing to building effective, accountable, and transparent institutions (Target 16.6) and promoting the rule of law in finance (Target 16.3).
